channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: APC Urges Fayemi to Resign Amid Criticism and Alleged Anti-Party Activities
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don yarn say former Ekiti State governor, Kayode Fayemi, suppose leave the party if him no dey believe in wetin dem dey stand for again. Ajibola Basiru, APC nationa...

item.title: Low American Economic Confidence Could Challenge Trump Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Recent Gallup research shows that only 16 percent of Americans currently rate the economy as excellent or good, signalling potential difficulties for President Trump and the Republican Party as the mi...

item.title: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif begins official four-day visit to China to strengthen bilateral ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif departed on Saturday for a four-day official visit to China, accompanied by key members of his cabinet including Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar, Pla...

item.title: Diana Rigg and Anthony Hopkins Together in London During 1972 National Theatre Season
item.description: In September 1972, legendary actors Diana Rigg and Anthony Hopkins were photographed spending time together in London, just months before their acclaimed performance in William Shakespeare’s Macbeth a...

item.title: JOOUST Student Alice Riang’a Laid to Rest Amid Ongoing Murder Investigation
item.description: Alice Riang’a, a second-year Bachelor of Education Science student at Jaramogi Oginga Odinga University of Science and Technology (JOOUST), tragically lost her life after being murdered in Bondo. Her ...

item.title: AI Reconstructs Cockpit Audio from Deceased Pilots Using Public Data
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) temporarily restricted access to its docket system after discovering that AI technology had been used to reconstruct the voices of pilots who died in a ...

item.title: Xi Jinping and Vladimir Putin Strengthen China-Russia Relations Amid Global Power Shifts
item.description: A week after US President Donald Trump's state visit to Beijing, Russian President Vladimir Putin met with Chinese President Xi Jinping, underscoring the growing strategic ties between China and Russi...

item.title: 911 Calls Reveal NASCAR Star Kyle Busch Experienced Severe Symptoms Before Death
item.description: Newly released 911 recordings reveal that NASCAR driver Kyle Busch was coughing up blood just a day before his untimely death at age 41. The calls, analyzed by CNN Medical Analyst Dr. Jonathan Reiner,...

item.title: Brunei in 1965: Modernization and Cultural Heritage Under Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III
item.description: The mid-1960s were a transformative period for Brunei, marking a turning point in the nation's journey toward modernity. Under Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien III, known as the 'Architect of Modern Brunei,...

item.title: Senate Minority Bloc Supports Sherwin Gatchalian for Senate Leadership
item.description: Members of the Senate minority bloc, identifying themselves as SB-11 or Solid Bloc 11, have expressed their preference for Senator Sherwin 'Win' Gatchalian to serve as the next Senate president. Senat...

item.title: Meralco evens PBA semifinals series after TNT loses key player Bol
item.description: In a thrilling turn of events in the PBA semifinals, the Meralco Bolts managed to level the series against TNT Tropang Giga following a challenging game for their opponents. TNT was hit with a double ...

item.title: Paul McCartney Delivers a Nostalgic yet Energetic Album with ‘The Boys of Dungeon Lane’
item.description: Paul McCartney’s latest album, 'The Boys of Dungeon Lane,' set for release on May 29, 2026, demonstrates his ability to blend nostalgia with lively rock energy, showing that age has not slowed his cre...

item.title: Ottawa Redblacks defeat Montreal Alouettes 27-12 in CFL pre-season matchup
item.description: In a Canadian Football League pre-season game held at Percival Molson Memorial Stadium, the Ottawa Redblacks defeated the Montreal Alouettes with a final score of 27-12. Ottawa's quarterback Jake Maie...

item.title: 'PBB Gen 11' alum Binsoy Namoca earns Criminology degree
item.description: Binsoy Namoca, known for his participation in 'Pinoy Big Brother: Generation 11', has successfully completed his college education, earning a degree in Criminology. His graduation marks a significant ...

item.title: Sindh declares four-day public holiday for Eidul Azha
item.description: The Sindh government has officially announced a four-day holiday for Eidul Azha, unlike the federal government which had declared only a three-day break. According to the notification issued by Sindh ...

item.title: King Misuzulu restructures royal office, closes private and chancellor offices
item.description: King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has announced significant reforms within the Office of the King, signalling a major restructuring of the royal administration. This includes the immediate closure of his pri...

item.title: Mexico clinches Miss Eco International 2026 crown; Gabbi Carballo places in Top 21

item.title: Investigation Reveals Sexual Misconduct Allegations on Married at First Sight UK

item.title: President Samia Names New Leadership for PSSSF Board
